channel.title: Operations on Gilbert N. Onyenwezi | Operations leader, Data Science & Artificial Intelligence Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Operations on Gilbert N. Onyenwezi | Operations leader, Data Science & Artificial Intelligence Portfolio

item.title: Experience
item.description:
experience: enable: true items: - job: “Operational Excellence & Distribution Leadership” company: “Wilsonart” companyUrl: "" date: “Apr 2023 – Sept 2025” content: | Led end-to-end operational performance across manufacturing and distribution, driving measurable improvements in efficiency, quality, and throughput through data-driven decision-making and Lean methodologies.

    **Operational Excellence Manager (2024 – 2025)**
    - Led enterprise-level supply chain and manufacturing transformation initiatives
    - Developed KPI frameworks across Safety, Quality, Service, and Cost
    - Built capacity planning models and multi-year operational roadmaps
    - Partnered with leadership to execute cross-functional strategic initiatives
    - Drove continuous improvement through Lean Six Sigma and structured problem-solving

    **Area Manager – Distribution (2023 – 2024)**
    - Managed distribution and receiving operations in high-volume environment
    - Led teams to achieve operational targets aligned with business objectives
    - Implemented process improvements to increase efficiency and reduce waste
    - Monitored daily performance metrics and executed corrective actions
    - Ensured compliance with ISO and quality standards

    **Impact**
    - Improved operational visibility through KPI-driven management
    - Reduced process inefficiencies and enhanced throughput
    - Strengthened alignment between operations, logistics, and leadership

- job: "Global Warehouse & Logistics Management"
  company: "Johnson Controls"
  companyUrl: ""
  date: "Mar 2022 – Mar 2023"
  content: |
    Managed global warehouse operations and eCommerce fulfillment, focusing on execution efficiency, logistics performance, and data-informed decision-making.

    - Directed end-to-end fulfillment operations and logistics coordination
    - Developed demand forecasts and operational plans using data analysis
    - Led warehouse relocation and operational transition initiatives
    - Evaluated and improved logistics partner performance
    - Collaborated with cross-functional teams to enhance customer experience

    **Impact**
    - Improved fulfillment reliability and operational responsiveness
    - Strengthened logistics coordination and execution consistency
    - Enhanced decision-making through data-driven forecasting

- job: "Transportation & Operations Leadership"
  company: "Amazon"
  companyUrl: ""
  date: "2018 – 2020"
  content: |
    Led transportation and fulfillment operations in a high-volume, performance-driven environment, focusing on process optimization, defect reduction, and team leadership.

    **Transportation Specialist (2019 – 2020)**
    - Managed transportation operations and stakeholder communication
    - Identified and eliminated process inefficiencies
    - Monitored service metrics and ensured operational targets were met

    **Area Manager (2018)**
    - Led a team of 100+ associates in fast-paced operations
    - Ensured adherence to safety and quality standards
    - Provided coaching, performance management, and workforce development

    **Impact**
    - Reduced operational defects and delays
    - Improved team performance and execution consistency
    - Strengthened operational discipline in high-volume environments

- job: "Operations & Executive Leadership"
  company: "Ferriesmart / Jand Homes / United Geophysical / Manaksia Industries"
  companyUrl: ""
  date: "2003 – 2016"
  content: |
    Held progressive leadership roles across operations, quality, and executive management, building a strong foundation in manufacturing, logistics, and organizational execution.

    **Chief Operating Officer – Ferriesmart / Jand Homes**
    - Directed company operations to achieve financial and strategic goals
    - Developed operational policies and business plans
    - Oversaw execution of company-wide initiatives

    **Operations Manager – United Geophysical Nigeria Limited**
    - Supported strategic projects and executive leadership initiatives
    - Managed communication, reporting, and organizational alignment
    - Led employee engagement and performance initiatives

    **Quality Control Manager – Manaksia Industries**
    - Managed production quality and process efficiency
    - Led cross-functional improvement initiatives
    - Ensured compliance with quality standards and procedures

    **Impact**
    - Built strong foundation in operational leadership and execution
    - Developed expertise in quality management and process improvement
    - Established leadership capability across multiple industries

item.title: Home
item.description:
Gilbert Onyenwezi

Operations Leader | Data Science & Data Engineering Portfolio

I build decision-ready systems at the intersection of operations, analytics, and technology.

With a background in manufacturing, supply chain, and operational excellence, I have led initiatives focused on improving quality, efficiency, and cost performance across complex environments. I am currently advancing my technical capabilities through a Master’s in Data Science with an AI specialization at Northwestern University.

Executive Summary

Most organizations generate data. Few translate it into consistent, actionable execution. My work focuses on closing that gap through KPI systems, data pipelines, and operational decision support.
